title: Celatorchis angustifolia
taxonomy: Celatorchis angustifolia is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae and is part of the tribe Cranichideae. Within the tribe, it is classified under the subtribe Goodyerinae. The exact classification of Celatorchis angustifolia is as follows: genus (Celatorchis), species (C. angustifolia). This classification is based on its morphological and genetic characteristics.
